## Summary

## Scope

### Included

### Explicitly not included

## Constraints and invariants

<!-- State what must remain true. Delete items that are not relevant and add project-specific boundaries. -->

- [ ] Essential content does not require WebGL, animation, or high-end hardware.
- [ ] Keyboard, touch, pointer, and screen-reader paths remain usable.
- [ ] No secret, private contact detail, client source, or proprietary rule is exposed.
- [ ] Professional claims and metrics are evidence-backed.
- [ ] Existing routes and canonical URLs remain valid or have a redirect plan.
- [ ] Failure modes have a safe fallback or explicit recovery path.
- [ ] The change is reversible without ambiguous manual state.

## Validation

<!-- List exact commands and manual checks. Explain any omitted check. -->

```text
npm test -- --watchAll=false
npm run build
```

- [ ] Relevant automated tests pass.
- [ ] Production build passes.
- [ ] Manual verification is documented below.

### Manual verification

- 

## Accessibility

<!-- Describe semantics, keyboard behavior, focus, motion, contrast, and fallback behavior. Write "No runtime impact" for documentation-only changes. -->

## Security and privacy

<!-- Describe new inputs, outputs, dependencies, public data, secrets, external services, and attack-surface changes. -->

## Performance

<!-- Include measurements for performance claims. Otherwise state the expected impact and why. -->

## Evidence and confidentiality

<!-- Required for resume, biography, case-study, project, or client-facing content. -->

- [ ] Contributions are attributed accurately.
- [ ] Metrics are verified or omitted.
- [ ] Client or project naming is approved for public use.
- [ ] Screenshots and diagrams contain no private or exploitable information.
- [ ] AI-assisted wording received factual and confidentiality review.

## Visual evidence

<!-- Add before and after screenshots or recordings for visible changes. Avoid private data. -->

## Rollback and recovery

<!-- How can this change be disabled or reversed? What state must be restored? -->

## Reviewer focus

<!-- Point reviewers to the highest-risk assumptions, files, or decisions. -->
